creator: teemu.ollakka@galeracluster.com
text:
Created attachment 203749
Update mysqlwsrep57-server to 5.7.25-25.17

Attached the patch to update the port to the new version.

The patch adds i386 to NOT_FOR_ARCHS, the build fails during linking phase on i386 due to undefined reference to __atomic_fetch_add_8.

The patch disables LDAP authentication SASL client library for MySQL 5.7 because it is included already in mysql57-client package.
